message:
feat(fcp-store): add diversity_bps metric and improve log capture tests

fcp-store/coverage.rs:
- Add diversity_bps() method to calculate source diversity as basis points
  relative to required minimum (10000 = fully met, lower = deficit)
- Enables percentage-based monitoring of diversity requirements

connectors/discord/api.rs:
- Fix log capture test to use explicit marker instead of relying on
  specific log message text that may change
- Add "log_capture_ready" marker for reliable test verification

fcp-telemetry/metrics.rs:
- Additional metric refinements

test vectors:
- Updated CBOR test vectors for enrollment and simulate requests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
